title: Paint Centre: Thank you, George – we’re proud to be nominated!
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We’re incredibly honoured to be nominated for Best Paint Store in the Best of George awards - and it’s all thanks to you, our loyal customers, contractors, and DIY community here in George.


> Being recognised as one of the top local businesses means the world to our team.


At Paint Centre George, we’ve always strived to be more than just a paint shop. We’re your trusted partner for quality paint products, expert advice, and exceptional customer service - all under one roof.

From Plascon paints and industrial coatings to waterproofing solutions, woodcare, and painting accessories, we’re proud to offer a wide range of premium products to suit any project, big or small.

We’d love your support in the Best of George awards. Please vote for us under the Best Paint Store category and help us continue doing what we love - helping George paint, renovate, and refresh homes and businesses. Cast your vote at: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


> To celebrate our nomination, we’ve launched our biggest give-away yet!


Win with Plascon at Paint Centre George:

- Weekly Plascon hamper winners every Friday
- All 11 winners become finalists in the draw to unlock a R20 000 in-store voucher on 30 August 2025!

How to enter:Spend R500 or more on any Plascon products at Paint Centre George and drop your till slip into the in-store entry box.

Visit us: 80 Hope Street, George, Western CapeCall us: 044 884 1888Website: www.paintcentregeorge.co.zaFind us on Google Maps: Paint Centre George LocationFollow us on Facebook: facebook.com/PaintCentreGeorgeFollow us on Instagram: instagram.com/paintcentregeorge

Thank you for the nomination, and for making us your preferred paint store in George.Here’s to adding more colour to every corner of our beautiful town!

Photo supplied.

Photo supplied.

Photo supplied.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
